audit_items.proof_trace: The pre-verification loop (L140-150) checks every unverified report's feedId against `s_dataStreamsFeedIdToAsset` and reverts with `FeedNotAllowlisted` before `verifyBulk` is ever called. FeedId extraction via `bytes32(reportData)` in the pre-check is consistent with `ReportV3.dataStreamsFeedId` in the post-verification loop (both read the first 32-byte slot of reportData). The function is atomic — no TOCTOU between the pre-check and the post-verification loop.
